title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Broadcom India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Broadcom India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Broadcom India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Broadcom India:
Broadcom India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Broadcom India!
